MOTOR comprises 1,629 sequences (25+ hours of video data) collected from 16 riders and integrates synchronized front, rear, and helmet videos, rider eye-gaze from wearable trackers, on-road audio, and telemetry (GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope). Rich annotations capture traffic context, rider state, 12 riding maneuvers spanning conventional and unconventional behaviors, and legality labels (Legal, Illegal, Unspecified). We benchmark rider behavior recognition and maneuver legality classification using state-of-the-art video action recognition backbones (CNN and Transformer-based), extended with multimodal fusion, and find that combining RGB, gaze, and telemetry consistently yields the best performance. MOTOR thus provides a unique foundation for advancing safety-critical understanding of two-wheeler riding. It offers the research community a benchmark to develop and evaluate models for behavior analysis, legality-aware prediction, and intelligent transportation systems. Dataset and code is available at https: //varuniiith.github.io/MOTOR-Dataset/

</details>


### [110] [FashionLens: Toward Versatile Fashion Image Retrieval via Task-Adaptive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22552)
*Haokun Wen,Xuemeng Song,Xinghao Xie,Xiaolin Chen,Xiangyu Zhao,Weili Guan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了FashionLens，一个基于多模态大语言模型的统一时尚图像检索框架，并在新构建的U-FIRE基准上实现了最先进的性能。核心创新包括Proposal-Guided Spherical Query Calibrator（动态调整查询表征到任务对齐的度量空间）和Gradient-Guided Adaptive Sampling策略（根据实时学习难度和数据规模自动重加权任务）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅关注狭窄的检索任务，无法统一支持多种查询格式和搜索意图的真实场景，缺乏一个能够处理多样化时尚检索需求的统一框架。

Method: 1) 构建U-FIRE综合基准，整合碎片化数据集并补充两个人工标注数据集用于泛化测试；2) 提出FashionLens框架，基于多模态大语言模型；3) 设计Proposal-Guided Spherical Query Calibrator，通过自适应球形线性插值动态调整查询表征；4) 开发Gradient-Guided Adaptive Sampling策略，根据实时学习难度和数据规模自动重加权任务。

Result: 在U-FIRE基准上，FashionLens在多种检索场景下取得了最先进性能，并能稳健泛化到未见任务。

Conclusion: 通过统一框架和创新的查询校准与自适应采样方法，成功实现了真正通用的时尚图像检索，数据和代码已开源。

Abstract: Fashion image retrieval is a cornerstone of modern e-commerce systems. A unified framework that supports diverse query formats and search intentions is highly desired in practice. However, existing approaches focus on narrow retrieval tasks and do not fully capture such diversity. Therefore, in this work, we aim to develop a unified framework capable of handling diverse realistic fashion retrieval scenarios, achieving truly versatile fashion image retrieval. To establish a data foundation, we first introduce U-FIRE, a comprehensive benchmark that consolidates fragmented fashion datasets into a unified collection, supplemented by two manually curated datasets for testing generalization. Building upon this, we propose FashionLens, a unified framework based on Multimodal Large Language Models. To handle divergent matching objectives, we design a Proposal-Guided Spherical Query Calibrator that dynamically shifts query representations into task-aligned metric spaces via adaptive spherical linear interpolation. Additionally, to mitigate the optimization imbalance caused by varying task complexities and data scales, we develop a Gradient-Guided Adaptive Sampling strategy that automatically re-weights tasks based on realtime learning difficulty and the data scale prior. Experiments on U-FIRE show that FashionLens achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse retrieval scenarios and generalizes robustly to unseen tasks. The data and code are publicly released at https://github.com/haokunwen/FashionLens.

</details>


### [111] [GeoWeaver: Grounding Visual Tokens with Geometric Evidence before Scene Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22558)
*Deshui Miao,Xingsen Huang,Yameng Gu,Xin Li,Haijun Zhang,Ming-Hsuan Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoWeaver是一个预推理几何基础框架，通过构建多层级几何库并对视觉token进行自适应几何证据分配，将几何信息作为视觉表征的前提条件而非后期融合信号，从而提升视觉语言模型的时空推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽然将几何信息引入多模态模型，但通常将几何线索视为所有视觉token的共享信号，忽略了不同视觉token因其空间角色的不同而需要不同几何证据这一更细粒度的挑战。

Method: GeoWeaver包含三个核心组件：1）从冻结的几何编码器中构建多层级几何库；2）进行token自适应的几何证据分配，使每个视觉token检索最相关的几何抽象；3）通过残差接地操作将选中的几何证据整合到视觉token中，在语言建模前形成几何基础的视觉表征。

Result: 在多个空间推理基准上的大量评估表明，GeoWeaver能够持续增强几何感知推理能力，同时保持一般的多模态能力。

Conclusion: 几何信息的最佳效益不是作为后期融合的辅助信号，而是作为塑造大语言模型推理表征基础的前提条件。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal reasoning in vision-language models requires visual representations that preserve physical geometry rather than merely semantic appearance. Recent multimodal models incorporate geometric information through structural branches, 3D-aware supervision, reasoning-stage fusion, or long-horizon memory. While these approaches demonstrate the importance of geometry for spatial intelligence, they typically treat geometric cues as a shared signal across all visual tokens. We note that this overlooks a finer-grained challenge: different visual tokens require different geometric evidence depending on their spatial roles. To address this limitation, we introduce GeoWeaver, a pre-reasoning geometric grounding framework that treats geometry as a representational prerequisite for spatio-temporal reasoning. GeoWeaver constructs a multi-level geometry bank from a frozen geometry encoder and performs token-adaptive geometric evidence allocation, enabling each visual token to retrieve the most relevant geometric abstractions. The selected evidence is incorporated into visual tokens via a residual grounding operation prior to language modeling, yielding geometry-grounded representations for downstream reasoning. Extensive evaluations on spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GeoWeaver consistently enhances geometry-aware reasoning while retaining general multimodal capabilities. This indicates that geometric information yields the greatest benefit not as a late-fusion auxiliary signal but as a fundamental prerequisite that shapes the representational foundation on which large language models perform reasoning. All source code and models will be released at https://github.com/yahooo-m/GeoWeaver .

</details>


### [112] [Cell Phantom Video Generation in Elliptical Fourier Descriptor Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22563)
*Francesco Benedetto,Roberto Basla,Luca Magri,Giacomo Boracchi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在椭圆傅里叶描述符（EFD）空间中生成细胞幻影视频的新框架，通过将细胞形态演化建模为EFD系数的多元时间序列，生成时间一致、生物上合理的合成细胞视频，以减轻细胞追踪数据集的标注负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物医学视频中的细胞追踪需要大量标注数据，但人工标注耗时且需要专业领域知识，导致公开标注数据稀缺。合成数据生成是缓解这一问题的有前途方案，但现有方法需要生成时间一致的细胞幻影以模拟特定细胞类型的生物过程。

Method: 提出了在椭圆傅里叶描述符（EFD）域中生成细胞幻影视频的框架。将细胞轮廓用EFD系数紧凑表示，进而将细胞幻影的演化建模为EFD系数的多元时间序列，引入强形态学先验，实现时间上连贯的序列生成。

Result: 实验验证表明，在EFD空间中建模时间演化能够生成生物学上合理的幻影视频，可有效用于细胞追踪合成数据的生成流水线。

Conclusion: 该方法能显著减轻创建新数据集的标注工作，代码已开源。

Abstract: Training Deep Neural Networks for tracking individual cells in biomedical videos requires a large amount of annotated data. The annotation of videos for cell tracking is very time consuming and often requires domain expertise; this explains the limited availability of public annotated data to address important medical problems like tissue repair or cancer treatment. Generating synthetic videos along with their Ground Truth annotations is a promising solution that relies, as a foundational first step, on the synthesis of single cell annotations (or phantoms). Phantoms need to be time consistent, as they have to replicate biological processes that are specific to the cell types. In this work, we propose a novel framework for generating videos of cell phantoms in the Elliptical Fourier Descriptors (EFDs) domain, a compact and geometrically interpretable representation for 2D closed contours. We represent the cell phantom evolution as a multivariate time series of EFD coefficients, introducing a strong prior for cell morphology and enabling the efficient generation of sequences that evolve coherently in time. Our experimental validation proves that modelling the temporal evolution in EFD space enables the generation of biologically plausible phantom videos. Our method can be used in generative pipelines for synthesizing annotated data for cell tracking, thus strongly mitigating the annotation effort for creating new datasets. Our code is available for download here: https://github.com/FrancescoBenedetto99/efd-cell-video-gen.

</details>


### [113] [VGenST-Bench: A Benchmark for Spatio-Temporal Reasoning via Active Video Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22570)
*Jinho Park,Youbin Kim,Hogun Park,Eunbyung Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出VGenST-Bench，一个利用生成模型主动合成高质量、多样化视频的时空推理基准，通过多智能体流程、3x2x2视频分类法和分层任务设计，实现对MLLM时空理解能力的细粒度评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时空推理基准数据集主要依赖静态图像集或被动收集的视频数据，限制了细粒度推理能力的评估。

Method: 提出多智能体流程（含人工质量控制），构建3x2x2视频分类法（空间尺度、视角、场景动态），设计分层任务套件（解耦低级视觉感知与高级时空推理）。

Result: VGenST-Bench实现了从被动筛选到主动合成的范式转变，能够对MLLM的时空理解进行细粒度诊断。

Conclusion: 通过主动合成高质量、可控、多样化的视频场景，VGenST-Bench能够更精确地评估MLLM的细粒度时空推理能力。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal reasoning is a core capability for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) operating in the real world. As such, evaluating it precisely has become an essential challenge. However, existing spatio-temporal reasoning benchmark datasets primarily rely on static image sets or passively curated video data, which limits the evaluation of fine-grained reasoning capabilities. In this paper, we introduce VGenST-Bench, a video benchmark that employs generative models to actively synthesize highly controlled and diverse evaluation scenarios. To construct VGenST-Bench, we propose a multi-agent pipeline incorporating a human quality control stage, ensuring the quality of all generated videos and QA pairs. We establish a comprehensive 3x2x2 video taxonomy, encompassing Spatial Scale, Perspective, and Scene Dynamics to span diverse scenarios. Furthermore, we design a hierarchical task suite that decouples low-level visual perception from high-level spatio-temporal reasoning. By shifting the paradigm from passive curation to active synthesis, VGenST-Bench enables fine-grained diagnosis of spatio-temporal understanding in MLLMs.

</details>


### [114] [SegGuidedNet: Sub-Region-Aware Attention Supervision for Interpretable Brain Tumor Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22572)
*Hasaan Maqsood,Saif Ur Rehman Khan,Sebastian Vollmer,Andreas Dengel,Muhammad Nabeel Asim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SegGuidedNet，一种3D残差编解码网络，通过轻量级SegAttentionGate模块显式监督解码器生成各肿瘤子区域的空间注意力图，在BraTS2021和BraTS2023上达到接近集成模型的性能，且参数量增加不到0.2%，并自带可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多参数MRI中脑肿瘤子区域分割面临形态变异、类别不平衡以及不同序列上肿瘤区域外观重叠等挑战，现有方法缺乏对解码器判别性的显式监督且难以兼顾轻量级与可解释性。

Method: 提出三维残差编解码网络SegGuidedNet，核心是SegAttentionGate模块：通过轻量辅助损失显式监督解码器为每个肿瘤子区域（坏死核心、水肿、增强肿瘤）生成空间判别性注意力图，参数量增加不到0.2%，推理时无需后处理解释方法即可获得空间可解释性。

Result: 在BraTS2021（251例）上平均Dice=0.905（ET=0.873, TC=0.906, WT=0.935）；在BraTS2023 GLI（251例）上平均Dice=0.897（ET=0.859, TC=0.902, WT=0.931）。作为单模型超越集成nnU-Net和HNF-Netv2，与10模型集成Swin UNETR相差2-4个Dice点，推理成本极低。

Conclusion: SegGuidedNet在轻量级框架下实现了具有竞争力的分割精度与内置可解释性，在两个基准版本上的一致性验证了方法的泛化能力，为临床实用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Accurate segmentation of brain tumour sub-regions from multi-parametric MRI is critical for treatment planning yet remains challenging due to morphological variability, class imbalance, and overlapping appearances of tumour regions across imaging sequences. We propose SegGuidedNet, a three-dimensional residual encoder--decoder network introducing a novel SegAttentionGate module that explicitly supervises the decoder to produce spatially discriminative attention maps for each tumour sub-region necrotic core, peritumoral oedema, and enhancing tumour via a lightweight auxiliary loss, adding less than 0.2% parameter overhead. This sub-region supervision maintains decoder discriminability between visually ambiguous classes while providing free-of-cost spatial interpretability at inference without any post-hoc explanation method. Evaluated independently on BraTS2021 and BraTS2023 GLI across 251 held-out subjects each, SegGuidedNet achieves mean Dice of 0.905 (ET= 0.873, TC=0.906, WT=0.935) and 0.897 (ET=0.859, TC=0.902, WT=0.931) respectively, surpassing ensemble-based nnU-Net and HNF-Netv2 as a single model and approaching Swin UNETR a 10-model ensemble within 2--4 Dice points at a fraction of the inference cost. The consistency of results across two benchmark editions further confirms the generalisability of the proposed approach, offering competitive accuracy with built-in interpretability in a lightweight, clinically practical framework.

</details>


### [115] [Beyond Chamfer Distance: Granular Order-aware Evaluation Metric For Online Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22578)
*Chouaib Bencheikh Lehocine,Adam Lilja,Junsheng Fu,Lars Hammarstrand*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对在线地图估计中现有评估指标（基于Chamfer距离的mAP）的缺陷，提出了两种新指标：SOSPA（序列最优子模式分配）用于单实例几何质量评估，PLD（折线定位与检测）用于多实例联合评估检测质量与几何精度。实验表明PLD能有效区分SOTA方法，并揭示检测能力是当前主要瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线地图估计方法依赖基于阈值Chamfer距离的mAP评估，该框架对点序不敏感且几何质量区分粒度不足，难以区分不同方法的真实优劣。

Method: 1) 提出SOSPA（序列最优子模式分配），一种顺序感知的单实例相似度度量，满足所有度量公理。2) 提出PLD（折线定位与检测），一种软度量，用软分配替代mAP的硬阈值，联合捕捉检测质量与几何精度。

Result: 在nuScenes数据集上，PLD有效排序了MapTRv2、StreamMapNet、MapTracker等SOTA方法，并提供了分解误差分析，揭示检测能力是当前方法的主要瓶颈，而mAP未能捕捉到这一趋势。

Conclusion: 提出了比mAP更精细、更合理的评估指标，为在线地图估计方法提供了更可靠的性能比较框架，并指出未来改进方向应聚焦于检测能力提升。

Abstract: Online map estimation is a crucial component of autonomous driving systems that reduces the reliance on costly high-definition maps. State-of-the-art (SOTA) methods commonly predict map elements as ordered sequences of points that form polylines and polygons. The evaluation of these methods relies predominantly on mean average precision (mAP) based on thresholded Chamfer distance (CD). This framework lacks sensitivity to point ordering and provides limited granularity in assessing geometric quality, making it difficult to distinguish which methods truly excel over others. In this work, we address these limitations on two fronts. For the single-instance similarity measure, we introduce sequence optimal sub-pattern assignment (SOSPA), an order-aware metric that enables fine-grained evaluation of individual geometries while satisfying all metric axioms. For the multi-instance evaluation framework, we propose polyline localisation and detection (PLD), a soft metric that jointly captures detection quality and geometric accuracy, replacing the hard thresholding of mAP with a principled soft assignment. Through evaluations on nuScenes, we demonstrate that PLD effectively ranks SOTA online mapping methods (MapTRv2, StreamMapNet, MapTracker) while providing a decomposed error analysis. This analysis identifies detection capability as the dominant bottleneck in current methods, revealing a performance trend that mAP fails to capture. Code for evaluation using our metrics will be released.

</details>


### [116] [SceneAligner: 3D-Grounded Floorplan Localization in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22581)
*Junhyeong Cho,Ruojin Cai,Hadar Averbuch-Elor*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种在真实场景中基于3D重建进行楼层平面定位的方法，将视觉图像与栅格化楼层平面图对齐，在稀疏图像（甚至单张）条件下仍表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有楼层平面定位方法局限于受控小规模环境和精确矢量化的楼层平面图，无法在大规模建筑和栅格化平面图上有效运行。本文旨在解决这一现实应用中的局限性。

Method: 首先从无约束图像集合中重建重力对齐的3D场景，投影为2D密度图作为楼层平面代理；然后将定位问题形式化为通过2D相似变换将密度图与输入楼层平面对齐；最后微调2D基础模型学习跨模态对应，实现外观差异跨越。

Result: 在多种场景下显著优于先前方法，尤其在极端稀疏设置（仅单张输入图像）下仍表现良好。

Conclusion: 提出了一种通用且鲁棒的楼层平面定位方案，能够在现实大规模建筑和栅格化平面图上工作，且对输入图像数量要求极低。

Abstract: Many public buildings provide floorplans with a "you are here" indicator to help visitors orient themselves. Floorplan localization seeks to computationally replicate this capability by determining where visual observations were captured within a floorplan. However, existing methods typically assume controlled small-scale environments and precise vectorized floorplans, limiting their ability to operate in large-scale buildings and rasterized floorplans. In this work, we present an approach for performing floorplan localization in the wild by grounding the task in a reconstructed 3D representation of the scene. Given an unconstrained image collection, our method reconstructs a gravity-aligned 3D scene and projects it into a 2D density map that serves as a floorplan proxy. Floorplan localization is then formulated as aligning this proxy with the input floorplan via a 2D similarity transform. To bridge the appearance gap between density maps and architectural floorplans, we adapt a 2D foundation model to learn cross-modal correspondences, introducing a fine-tuning scheme that encourages semantically aligned matches while preserving structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial improvements over prior methods, including in extremely sparse settings with as little as a single input image. Our code and data will be publicly available.

</details>


### [117] [Rethinking Noise-Robust Training for Frozen Vision Foundation Models: A Cross-Dataset Benchmark with a Case Study of Small-Loss Failure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22591)
*Zitong Li,Haoyu Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文构建了一个包含150个条件、6000次训练的基准测试，系统评估了八种噪声标签学习方法在冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）上的表现。结果表明没有通用最优方法，噪声严重时方法选择的影响从4.5个百分点增至18.8个百分点。研究发现，在冻结特征下干净与噪声损失分布重叠高达53-61%，预测一致性比损失排名更稳定。最后给出基于证据的实践指南和低遗憾的特征空间选择器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）结合轻量分类头在医学影像中广泛应用，但针对这种冻结特征场景下的噪声标签学习方法尚不清楚，现有方法大多依赖于从端到端训练继承而来的"小损失假设"。

Method: 构建受控基准：包含8种噪声标签方法、5个医学数据集、3种骨干网络、2种噪声类型、5种噪声率（共150个条件、6000次训练），使用平衡准确率评估。通过Friedman排名分析全局表现，并深入分析小损失假设在代表性高风险场景下的有效性。

Result: 1）无通用胜者：ELR在49/150个条件下最优，CUFIT获得最佳平均排名（2.51）；2）方法选择代价随噪声严重程度从4.5pp增至18.8pp；3）冻结DINOv2特征下，干净与噪声分布重叠53-61%；4）预测一致性比损失排名更稳定（非对称噪声下精度下降3pp vs 13pp）；5）Co-Teaching在ISIC2019非对称40%噪声下整体准确率68%但平衡准确率仅35.1%，三个少数类召回率为零。

Conclusion: 冻结VFM下的噪声标签学习应被视为一个"感知场景的方法选择问题"而非寻找单一主导算法。论文提供了基于证据的实践指导和低遗憾的特征空间选择器用于实际推荐。

Abstract: Frozen Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) with lightweight classification heads are increasingly used in medical imaging because they offer efficient and reproducible deployment. Yet noisy-label learning methods for this frozen-feature regime remain poorly understood, and most existing methods still rely on a small-loss assumption inherited from end-to-end training. We present a controlled benchmark of eight noisy-label methods across five medical datasets, three backbones, two noise types, and five noise rates (150 conditions, 6,000 training runs), evaluated with balanced accuracy. The benchmark shows that there is no universal winner: Friedman ranking over the 150 conditions yields $χ^2 = 333.2$ ($p = 4.77 \times 10^{-68}$), ELR wins the most conditions (49/150), while CUFIT attains the best mean rank (2.51). The practical cost of method choice grows sharply with noise severity, from 4.5pp on clean data to 18.8pp at asymmetric 40\% noise. To explain these benchmark-level patterns, we revisit the small-loss assumption in a representative high-risk regime. Under frozen DINOv2 features, clean and noisy loss distributions overlap by 53--61\%, and matched-rate clean-sample detection shows that prediction agreement is markedly more stable than loss ranking under asymmetric noise (3pp vs.\ 13pp precision drop). On ISIC2019 with asymmetric 40\% noise, Co-Teaching reaches 68\% overall accuracy while collapsing to 35.1\% balanced accuracy with zero recall on three minority classes. Together, these results recast noisy-label learning for frozen VFMs as a regime-aware method-selection problem rather than a search for a single dominant algorithm. We conclude with evidence-based guidance and a low-regret feature-space selector for practical recommendation.

</details>


### [118] [Enhancing Gaze Reasoning in Vision Foundation Models for Gaze Following](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22607)
*Shijing Wang,Yaping Huang,Chaoqun Cui,David Wong,Yihua Cheng,Alexandros Neophytou,Hyung Jin Chang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种增强视觉基础模型（VFM）在视线跟随任务中视线推理能力的新训练机制，通过头条件局部LoRA和出锥惩罚，在非显著目标场景下显著提升性能，在GazeFollow和VAT数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VFM基方法虽提升了场景理解能力，但在视线推理方面贡献有限，导致模型倾向于依赖语义显著物体而非真实视线线索，在目标非显著时性能下降。

Method: (1) 头条件局部LoRA：实现局部适应，保留场景token学习的同时改进头部token学习以增强视线推理；(2) 出锥惩罚：将视线线索注入头部token，同时使其与场景token对齐。

Result: 在GazeFollow和VAT数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在视线目标非语义显著时提升显著。

Conclusion: 该方法有效弥补了VFM在视线推理方面的不足，为非显著目标场景下的视线跟随研究提供了新思路。

Abstract: Gaze following requires both scene understanding and gaze reasoning to localize the gaze target of an in-scene person. Recently, vision foundation models (VFMs) have demonstrated strong performance on this task, enabling simpler architectures while outperforming prior methods. However, we observe a key limitation of VFM-based approaches: while VFMs substantially improve scene understanding, they contribute little to gaze reasoning. As a result, existing methods often rely on semantically salient objects rather than true gaze cues, leading to degraded performance when targets are not salient. To address this, we propose a novel training mechanism to enhance gaze reasoning in VFMs for gaze following. Our method includes: (1) a head-conditioned local LoRA, which enables localized adaptation to preserve scene token learning while improving head token learning for gaze reasoning; and (2) an out-of-cone penalty, which injects gaze cues into head tokens while aligning them with scene tokens. Experiments on the GazeFollow and VAT datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong improvements when gaze targets are not semantically salient. Our findings offer valuable insights for advancing future gaze following research. We will release the code once the paper is accepted.

</details>


### [119] [GLeVE: Graph-Guided Lesion Grounding with Proposal Verification in 3D CT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22619)
*Shuo Jiang,Yuhao Hong,Chunbo Jiang,Weihong Chen,Huangwei Chen,Shenghao Zhu,Beining Wu,Mingxuan Liu,Zhu Zhu,Feiwei Qin,Min Tan,Yifei Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了GLeVE框架，通过图引导的病灶定位、解剖先验验证和八叉树自回归细化，实现了从放射报告文本到3D CT体积的精准病灶级对齐与分割。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖短语级对齐或密集像素监督，导致病灶级别的对应关系有限、定位精度不足，难以弥合文本描述与三维解剖结构之间的语义-空间鸿沟。

Method: 1) 将病灶描述视为原子语义单元，通过关系感知图推理编码器官归属、属性及病灶间关系，生成判别性病灶级查询；2) 解剖感知的候选区域生成与区域级验证实现一对一的文本-病灶对齐；3) 层次化八叉树细化逐步改善边界描绘。

Result: 在AbdomenAtlas 3.0数据集上，该方法在分割精度和病灶级定位方面均优于经典多模态基础模型和报告监督基线方法。

Conclusion: GLeVE通过图引导的语义解析与层次化空间细化，有效缩小了文本与三维解剖之间的语义-空间鸿沟，为放射报告到3D CT的病灶级定位提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Grounding radiology report descriptions to 3D CT volumes is essential for verifiable clinical interpretation, yet remains challenging due to the semantic-spatial gap between free-text narratives and volumetric anatomy. Existing report-assisted and vision-language grounding methods typically rely on phrase-level alignment or dense pixel supervision, resulting in limited lesion-wise correspondence and suboptimal localization accuracy. We propose GLeVE, a graph-guided lesion grounding framework with anatomical prior verification and octree-based autoregressive refinement. GLeVE treats each lesion description as an atomic semantic unit and encodes organ attribution, attributes, and inter-lesion relations through relation-aware graph reasoning to produce discriminative lesion-wise queries. Anatomy-aware proposal generation with region-level verification enforces one-to-one text-lesion alignment, while hierarchical octree refinement progressively improves boundary delineation. Experiments on AbdomenAtlas 3.0 demonstrate consistent gains over classical multimodal foundation models and report-supervised baselines in both segmentation accuracy and lesion-level localization.

</details>


### [120] [H-Flow: Self-supervised Human Scene Flow via Physics-inspired Joint Multi-modal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22629)
*Zhanbo Huang,Xiaoming Liu,Yu Kong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: H-Flow提出了一种从单目视频估计密集人体场景流的方法，能同时捕捉骨骼运动与表面变形，通过物理先验进行无监督训练，并发布了带密集流标注的合成基准DynAct4D。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 参数化人体模型无法表示服装和软组织的非刚性动态，而通用场景流在关节点运动人体上失效，同时像素级标注难以获取。

Method: 提出H-Flow，利用统一多头Transformer从单目视频估计密集场景流，联合预测姿态与深度；通过编码几何、结构和生物力学先验作为跨模态训练目标，替代不可获取的真实标注。

Result: 在标准基准上优于场景流和参数化基线，且零样本泛化到真实世界视频。

Conclusion: H-Flow通过物理先验驱动的无监督学习，有效实现了人体密集场景流估计，解决了现有方法在人体表面动态建模上的不足。

Abstract: Parametric human models capture global pose but cannot represent the non-rigid surface dynamics of clothing and soft tissue. Generic scene flow estimates dense motion but breaks down on articulated bodies, where pixel-level supervision is also intractable to acquire. We introduce H-Flow, a dense human scene flow that captures both skeletal kinematics and surface deformation. A unified multi-head transformer estimates flow from monocular video, jointly predicting pose and depth as companion outputs. The challenge lies in the lack of supervision. In place of unattainable labels, we anchor the network in the physics of human motion, encoding geometric, structural, and biomechanical priors as cross-modal training objectives. We further introduce DynAct4D, a high-fidelity synthetic benchmark providing dense flow annotations across diverse subjects, garments, and motions. On standard benchmarks, H-Flow outperforms scene-flow and parametric baselines, and generalizes zero-shot to in-the-wild video. Code, models, and the DynAct4D benchmark will be released upon publication

</details>


### [121] [AtomicMotion: Learning Human Motion From Different Human Parts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22631)
*Runzhen Liu,Chuhua Xian,Fa-Ting Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AtomicMotion框架通过将人体骨架分解为五个功能簇、引入掩码全身预训练策略以及提出运动学注意力机制，从稀疏的头和手轨迹中高保真地重建全身姿态，在AMASS数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将人体视为单一整体，无法捕捉细微信号变化中的"原子意图"，且忽视人体固有结构拓扑，导致误差累积和非自然的关节协调。

Method: 1) 将骨架按功能意图划分为五个独立簇（逻辑身体分区）；2) 训练时采用掩码全身预条件化策略，迫使模型学习全局骨架拓扑和潜在运动学约束；3) 提出运动学注意力机制，将经典运动学树结构嵌入注意力机制中，保证生物合理性。

Result: 在AMASS数据集上，AtomicMotion在重建保真度和生物力学真实性方面显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过解耦与重构身体动力学，结合结构化分区分组、预条件化训练和运动学感知注意力，能从稀疏输入中实现高精度、生物合理的全身姿态重建。

Abstract: Accurately reconstructing full-body poses from sparse head and hand trajectories is a foundational challenge for immersive AR/VR telepresence. Current methods often struggle with error accumulation and unnatural joint coordination, primarily because they treat the human body as a monolithic entity, thereby failing to capture the fine-grained ``atomic intents'' embedded in subtle signal variations and overlooking the inherent structural topology. To bridge this gap, we present AtomicMotion, a framework designed to decouple and re-integrate body dynamics through three core innovations. First, we introduce a logical body partitioning scheme that decomposes the skeleton into five distinct clusters based on functional intent; this ensures that each partition preserves internal joint synergies while isolating local motion primitives. Second, to robustly map sparse inputs to high-dimensional poses, we employ a masked full-body pre-conditioning strategy during training, forcing the model to internalize global skeletal topology and latent kinematic constraints. Finally, addressing the limitations of vanilla spatial attention, which often ignores fixed physiological connectivity, we propose Kinematic Attention. By embedding the classical kinematic tree structure into the attention mechanism, we ensure biological plausibility in the synthesized motions. Extensive evaluations on the AMASS dataset demonstrate that AtomicMotion significantly outperforms existing baselines, yielding higher reconstruction fidelity and superior biomechanical realism.

</details>


### [122] [From Baseline to Follow-Up: Counterfactual Spine DXA Image Synthesis in UK Biobank Using a Causal Hierarchical Variational Autoencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22649)
*Yilin Zhang,Nicholas C. Harvey,Nicholas R. Fuggle,Rahman Attar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种元数据条件化的因果层次变分自编码器（CHVAE），用于生成UK Biobank的AP脊柱DXA图像，通过因果推理实现可解释的解剖变异合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前DXA图像分析缺乏可控且可解释的因子特异性解剖变异学习方法，难以进行因果一致的图像生成。

Method: 构建元数据条件化的因果层次变分自编码器，采用 abduction-action-prediction (AAP) 框架实现因果一致性评估。

Result: 在年龄干预下，关键椎体形态变量展现出强绝对一致性水平，支持干预对齐的解剖学合理DXA图像合成。

Conclusion: CHVAE能够生成因果一致、解剖学合理的AP脊柱DXA图像，为大规模骨骼评估中的可控图像生成提供新方法。

Abstract: Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) is widely used for large-scale skeletal assessment, yet learning controllable and interpretable factor-specific anatomical variation remains challenging. We propose a metadata-conditioned causal hierarchical variational autoencoder (CHVAE) for causally consistent generation of anteroposterior (AP) spine DXA images from the UK Biobank (UKB). The model is trained on 3,743 raw AP spine scans from the first imaging visit and conditioned on basic participant attributes and lumbar morphometry. Causal consistency is evaluated in a baseline-to-follow-up setting using abduction--action--prediction (AAP): latent variables are abducted from baseline images, age is intervened to the repeat-imaging value, and the resulting counterfactual follow-up morphometry is compared with observed repeat-imaging measurements. Results show strong absolute-level agreement for key vertebral morphometry variables under age intervention, supporting intervention-aligned synthesis of anatomically plausible DXA images.

</details>


### [123] [What Does the Caption Really Say? Counterfactual Phrase Intervention for Compositional Data Selection in Vision-Language Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22651)
*Hyejin Go,Semi Lee,Hyesong Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 Counterfactual Phrase Intervention (CPI)，一种短语级筛选框架，通过反事实短语替换生成短语敏感度分数，解决了CLIP式对比预训练中全局配对分数无法捕捉短语级组合监督的问题。在CC3M规模下，CPI仅用50%数据即可在VL-CheckList-VG Relation上超越全量数据和传统对齐过滤，且与多种损失函数正交，能进一步提升NegCLIP和CE-CLIP性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CLIP风格对比预训练使用样本级过滤信号（基于图文对对齐分数），但作者发现该信号存在饱和现象：一旦粗粒度不匹配被移除，更严格的全局过滤不再能追踪标题中保留的组合式监督。原因是全局分数混淆了"配对是否大致合理"与"标题中的个体对象、属性、关系短语是否实质支持图文匹配"——后者正是组合泛化所需，但配对级过滤对此视而不见。

Method: CPI框架分两步：(1) 全局对齐仅用于粗粒度不匹配移除；(2) 对幸存池按短语敏感度排序——通过受控的非词替换（nonce-token substitution）将替换后的图文分数变化转化为图像条件下的短语敏感度分数。CPI被定位为一阶短语敏感度信号，而非定位或识别结果。

Result: 在CC3M规模下，按CPI信号筛选50%数据：VL-CheckList-VG Relation比全量基线提升+1.91，比等预算下仅用对齐过滤提升+1.00；同时改善SugarCrepe整体性能，保持通用迁移能力。应用于NegCLIP时，VL-CheckList-VG Relation进一步提升+3.84；CE-CLIP也有额外增益。

Conclusion: CPI有效弥补了全局配对分数在短语级组合监督上的盲区，且具有损失函数正交性，能适配多种CLIP变体。这表明短语级的细粒度筛选比全局对齐更有利于组合泛化。

Abstract: CLIP-style contrastive pretraining typically curates web-scale image-text pairs using sample-level filtering signals, often based on pair-level alignment. We show that this signal saturates: once coarse mismatches are removed, stricter global filtering no longer tracks the compositional supervision provided by the retained captions. The reason is structural - a global score conflates whether a pair is broadly plausible with whether the individual object, attribute, and relation phrases inside the caption materially support the image-text match. The latter is what compositional generalization demands, yet pair-level filters are blind to it. We address this with Counterfactual Phrase Intervention (CPI), a phrase-level curation framework that converts controlled nonce-token substitutions into image-conditioned phrase-sensitivity scores. CPI uses global alignment only for coarse mismatch removal, then ranks the surviving pool by whether caption phrases measurably affect the image-text score under controlled substitution. We frame CPI as a first-order phrase-sensitivity signal rather than a grounding or identification result, and evaluate it at CC3M scale. Ranking by this signal yields a 50%-data subset that improves VL-CheckList-VG Relation by +1.91 over the full-data baseline and +1.00 over alignment-only filtering at matched budget, while improving SugarCrepe overall and preserving general transfer. CPI is loss-orthogonal: applied unchanged to NegCLIP, it further improves VL-CheckList-VG Relation by +3.84, with additional CE-CLIP gains in the main text.

</details>


### [124] [SegCompass: Exploring Interpretable Alignment with Sparse Autoencoders for Enhanced Reasoning Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22658)
*Zhenyu Lu,Liupeng Li,Jinpeng Wang,Haoqian Kang,Yan Feng,Ke Chen,Yaowei Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SegCompass 提出了一种基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的可解释推理分割框架，通过将链式思维推理与视觉特征映射到共享稀疏概念空间，实现可微分、可追溯的白盒对齐，在五个基准上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理分割流程存在可解释性鸿沟：潜变量查询对齐是端到端但黑箱的，而文本定位读取出力可读但不可真正解释，常作为后验步骤。作者希望在推理与视觉感知之间建立透明、可检查的连接。

Method: SegCompass 首先对图像-指令对生成 CoT 推理轨迹；核心是用 SAE 将 CoT 和视觉 token 映射到共享高维稀疏概念空间；通过查询码本选择显著概念，再由槽映射器生成多槽热图指导掩码解码器；整个模型联合训练，结合强化学习（推理路径）与标准分割监督。

Result: 在五个挑战性基准上达到或超越 SOTA；定性与定量分析显示，学习的稀疏概念质量与最终掩码精度之间存在强相关性，证明模型通过增强可检查的对齐取得了优异结果。

Conclusion: SAE驱动的接口提供了比潜变量查询更可追溯、比文本读出来更连贯的白盒连接，成功弥合了推理分割中的可解释性鸿沟。

Abstract: While large language models provide strong compositional reasoning, existing reasoning segmentation pipelines fail to transparently connect this reasoning to visual perception. Current methods, such as latent query alignment, are end-to-end yet opaque "black boxes". Conversely, textual localization readout is merely readable, not truly interpretable, often functioning as an unconstrained post-hoc step. To bridge this interpretability gap, we propose SegCompass, an end-to-end model that leverages a Sparse Autoencoder (SAE) to forge an explicit, interpretable, and differentiable alignment pathway. Given an image-instruction pair, SegCompass first generates a chain-of-thought (CoT) trace. The core of our method is an SAE that maps both the CoT and visual tokens into a shared, high-dimensional sparse concept space. A query codebook selects salient concepts from this space, which are then spatially grounded by a slot mapper into a multi-slot heatmap that guides the final mask decoder. The entire model is trained jointly, unifying reinforcement learning for the reasoning path with standard segmentation supervision. This SAE-driven interface provides a "white-box" connection that is significantly more traceable than latent queries and more coherent than textual readouts. Extensive experiments on five challenging benchmarks demonstrate that SegCompass matches or surpasses state-of-the-art performance. Crucially, our visual and quantitative analyses show a strong correlation between the quality of the learned sparse concepts and final mask accuracy, confirming that SegCompass achieves superior results through its enhanced and inspectable alignment. Code is available at https://github.com/ZhenyuLU-Heliodore/SegCompass.

</details>


### [125] [SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22668)
*Javad Rajabi,Kimia Shaban,Koorosh Roohi,David B. Lindell,Babak Taati*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SEGA是一种无需训练的动态注意力缩放方法，通过根据潜在空间频率结构自适应缩放RoPE组件，提升扩散模型在超出训练范围分辨率下的图像生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散变压器在超分辨率生成时性能下降，现有无训练方法对RoPE组件采用统一的、与内容无关的缩放策略，导致全局结构与细粒度细节之间出现权衡。

Method: 提出SEGA方法，根据每个去噪步骤中潜在空间的空间-频率结构，动态地自适应缩放不同频率特征的RoPE组件的注意力。

Result: SEGA在多个目标分辨率下持续提升高分辨率合成质量，超越了当前最先进的无训练基线方法。

Conclusion: 自适应地根据频率特征缩放注意力可以有效改善超分辨率生成的结构一致性与细节保真度，且无需额外训练。

Abstract: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) have emerged as a dominant architecture for text-to-image generation, yet their performance drops when generating at resolutions beyond their training range. Existing training-free approaches mitigate this by modifying inference-time attention behavior, often through Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) extrapolation combined with attention scaling. However, these strategies apply a uniform and content-agnostic scaling across RoPE components with distinct frequency characteristics, inducing a trade-off between preserving global structure and recovering fine detail. We introduce SEGA, a training-free method that dynamically scales attention across RoPE components according to the latent's spatial-frequency structure at each denoising step. This adaptive scaling improves both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Experiments show that SEGA consistently improves high-resolution synthesis across multiple target resolutions, outperforming state-of-the-art training-free baselines.

</details>


### [126] [From Abstraction to Instantiation: Learning Behavioral Representation for Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22671)
*Bing Hu,Zaijing Li,Rui Shao,Junda Chen,April Hua Liu,Wei-Shi Zheng,Liqiang Nie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BehaviorVLA通过时序连贯的行为表示学习，在分布偏移下实现鲁棒的机器人操作，在多个基准上达到SOTA，且数据效率优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在分布偏移下性能下降，基于动作的潜在变量方法受限于短时域碎片化和静态执行对齐，无法建模复杂场景下的连贯行为。

Method: 提出BehaviorVLA框架，包含两个对称组件：(1) 基于因果Mamba的视觉运动行为编码器(VBE)，聚合长时域轨迹信息；(2) 阶段条件行为解码器(PBD)，动态对齐任务级先验与实时执行进度以解码精确动作。

Result: 在RoboTwin 2.0、LIBERO、CALVIN上分别达到58%、98%、4.36的SOTA性能；在真实sim-to-real迁移中，仅用50%演示数据即可匹配OpenVLA-OFT的性能。

Conclusion: BehaviorVLA通过时序连贯的行为表征学习，有效提升了VLA模型在分布偏移下的泛化能力和数据效率。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often suffer from performance degradation under distribution shifts, as they struggle to learn generalized behavior representations across varying environments. While existing approaches attempt to construct behavior representations through action-centric latent variables, they are often limited by short-horizon temporal fragmentation and static execution-alignment, leading to inconsistent behaviors in complex scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{BehaviorVLA}, a framework that facilitates robust manipulation through the learning of a temporally coherent behavioral representations. Our approach features two symmetric components: (1) the \textbf{Visuomotor Behavior Encoder (VBE)}, which utilizes a causal Mamba-based architecture to aggregate long-horizon trajectory information into a unified behavior representation; and (2) the \textbf{Phase-conditioned Behavior Decoder (PBD)}, which decodes this representation into precise actions by dynamically aligning task-level priors with real-time execution progress. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0, LIBERO, and CALVIN demonstrate state-of-the-art success rates of 58\%, 98\%, and 4.36 (Avg.Len), respectively. Notably, in real-world sim-to-real transfer, BehaviorVLA matches the performance of OpenVLA-OFT using only 50\% of the demonstration data, showcasing its superior data efficiency and generalization.

</details>


### [127] [Slimmable ConvNeXt: Width-Adaptive Inference for Efficient Multi-Device Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22677)
*Janek Haberer,Jon Eike Wilhelm,Olaf Landsiedel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Slimmable ConvNeXt，利用ConvNeXt的现代设计（LayerNorm和倒置瓶颈结构）实现了无需切换批归一化的通道宽度可伸缩推理，在ImageNet-1k上以更简单的训练流程超越了HydraViT、MatFormer等现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有宽度自适应网络（如CNN）依赖可切换的批归一化，增加了训练复杂度；而最新的可伸缩方法多聚焦于Vision Transformer。作者希望利用ConvNeXt的现代设计简化这一流程，实现更高效的宽度自适应推理。

Method: 基于ConvNeXt架构，利用LayerNorm和倒置瓶颈（inverted bottleneck）结构替代传统CNN中的批归一化，实现通道宽度方向的可伸缩子网络训练。训练流程较传统CNN和ViT方法更简洁，无需切换归一化层。

Result: ImageNet-1k上，Slimmable ConvNeXt-T（3个子网络）在4.5 GMACs达到80.8% top-1准确率，1.2 GMACs达77.4%。在相同计算量下，相比HydraViT（6头：78.4%，3头：73.0%）分别高出2.4和4.4个百分点，也超过MatFormer-S（78.6%）和SortedNet-S（78.2%）。Slimmable ConvNeXt-B在15.35 GMACs达82.8%。

Conclusion: ConvNeXt的现代设计天然适合通道宽度可伸缩推理，无需批归一化切换即可实现高效的动态推理，在精度-计算量权衡上显著优于现有CNN和ViT可伸缩方法。

Abstract: Deploying vision models across devices with varying resource constraints, or even on a single device where available compute fluctuates due to battery state, thermal throttling, or latency deadlines, typically requires training and maintaining separate models. Width-adaptive inference addresses this by training a single set of shared weights containing multiple nested subnetworks of increasing capacity, but prior CNN-based approaches required switchable batch normalization, while recent scalable methods have focused on Vision Transformers. We present Slimmable ConvNeXt, which shows that ConvNeXt's modern design, specifically LayerNorm and inverted bottlenecks, makes it particularly suited for channel-width slimming, eliminating the normalization overhead of classical slimmable networks and producing a simpler training pipeline than both prior CNN and ViT approaches. On ImageNet-1k, Slimmable ConvNeXt-T with 3 subnetworks achieves 80.8% top-1 accuracy at 4.5 GMACs and 77.4% at 1.2 GMACs, trained from scratch for 600 epochs. At comparable compute, this exceeds HydraViT's 6-head subnetwork (78.4% at 4.6 GMACs) by 2.4 percentage points and its 3-head configuration (73.0% at 1.3 GMACs) by 4.4 percentage points, while also outperforming MatFormer-S (78.6%) and SortedNet-S (78.2%) at the same GMACs. Scaling to Slimmable ConvNeXt-B further improves maximum accuracy to 82.8% at 15.35 GMACs.

</details>


### [128] [Swift Sampling: Selecting Temporal Surprises via Taylor Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22678)
*Dahye Kim,Bhuvan Sachdeva,Karan Uppal,Naman Gupta,Vineeth N. Balasubramanian,Deepti Ghadiyaram*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Swift Sampling，一种无需训练、基于预测编码理论的视频帧选择算法，通过计算潜空间中特征的速度和加速度，利用泰勒展开预测帧演化轨迹，选择偏离预测的"时间意外"帧，以极低计算开销（0.02x额外成本）在长视频QA任务中显著超越均匀采样等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视频中大量帧是冗余的，关键信息存在于视觉特征偏离预测演化的"时间意外"时刻。受人类大脑预测编码机制启发，作者希望设计一种轻量级、无需训练、无需辅助网络或超参数调优的帧选择方法。

Method: 1. 将视频建模为视觉潜空间中的可微轨迹；2. 计算特征的速度和加速度；3. 利用泰勒展开投影后续帧的期望路径；4. 挑选与该预测流形显著偏离的帧作为"时间意外"帧进行采样。该方法无需训练、无需辅助网络、无需视频特定超参数。

Result: 在3个长视频问答基准和10个下游任务中，Swift Sampling优于均匀采样和现有查询无关基线。额外计算开销仅为0.02x，比领先基线便宜30倍。在长视频且预算有限的场景下，准确率提升可达+12.5个点。

Conclusion: Swift Sampling是一种高效、轻量、无需训练的帧选择方法，通过捕捉时间意外信息，在极低计算成本下显著提升长视频理解性能，尤其适用于帧预算受限的场景。

Abstract: While most frames in long-form video are redundant, the critical information resides in temporal surprises: moments where the actual visual features deviate from their predicted evolution. Inspired by the human brain's predictive coding, we introduce Swift Sampling, an elegant, training-free frame selection algorithm that automatically identifies high-information moments in a video. Specifically, we model a video as a differentiable trajectory in the visual latent space and compute the velocity and acceleration of its features. Then, we apply Taylor expansion to project the expected path of subsequent frames. Frames that diverge sharply from this predicted manifold are identified as temporally surprising frames and selected for sampling. Unlike prior training-free methods that rely on auxiliary networks or video-specific hyperparameter tuning, Swift Sampling is incredibly lightweight, adding only 0.02x additional computational cost over baseline making it 30x cheaper overhead than leading baselines. Across three long-video question answering benchmarks and 10 different downstream tasks, Swift Sampling outperforms uniform sampling and prior query-agnostic baselines. It is especially powerful for long videos with limited frame budgets improving accuracy by up to +12.5 points.

</details>


### [129] [Conceptualizing Embeddings: Sparse Disentanglement for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22679)
*Piotr Kubaty,Patryk Marszałek,Łukasz Struski,Adam Wróbel,Jacek Tabor,Marek Śmieja*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CEDAR通过可逆变换和top-k稀疏瓶颈，在不增加维度的情况下解缠视觉-语言模型的嵌入表示，使其坐标轴与语义概念对齐，优于传统稀疏自编码器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器扩展维度会破坏原始几何结构并引入冗余，需要一种保持维度不变的方法来揭示多模态嵌入的语义组成结构。

Method: 提出CEDAR方法，通过学习一个可逆变换并引入top-k稀疏瓶颈，将预训练嵌入的语义信息集中到与坐标轴对齐的解缠坐标上。对CLIP架构用文本概念解释坐标，对BLIP等生成模型则解码为自然语言描述。

Result: 在重建-稀疏权衡上达到竞争性表现，产生的解释更具可解释性且与人类感知更一致。

Conclusion: 视觉-语言表征的表观纠缠可通过合适的基变换解决，无需过完备维度扩展。

Abstract: Vision-language models learn powerful multimodal embeddings, yet their internal semantics remain opaque. While sparse autoencoders (SAEs) can extract interpretable features, they rely on expanding the representation dimension, which compromises the original geometry and introduces redundancy. We introduce CEDAR (Conceptual Embedding Disentanglement via Adaptive Rotation), a post-hoc method that reveals the compositional structure of pretrained embeddings without increasing dimensionality. By learning an invertible transformation with a top-$k$ sparsity bottleneck, CEDAR concentrates semantic information into axis-aligned disentangled coordinates. In CLIP-like architecture, individual coordinates can be interpreted with textual concepts, while for generative models such as BLIP, they can be decoded into natural language descriptions. Experiments demonstrate that CEDAR achieves a competitive reconstruction-sparsity trade-off while producing explanations that are more interpretable and better aligned with human perception. Our results suggest that the apparent entanglement in vision-language representations can be resolved through a suitable change of basis, eliminating the need for overcomplete expansions.

</details>


### [130] [Improving Viewpoint-Invariance and Temporal Consistency for Action Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22695)
*Yannick Porto,Renato Martins,Thomas Chalumeau,Cedric Demonceaux*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段动作检测方法，通过虚拟视点增强和基于状态空间序列建模的多尺度时间编码器，显著提升了视角不变性和全局时间一致性，在PKU-MMD和BABEL基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于外观的动作检测方法在训练时视角多样性有限，而基于运动的方法难以建模连续运动窗口间的细粒度时间关系，导致在视角变化和长时间一致性方面表现不佳。

Method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段从增强的虚拟视点提取运动特征（仅训练时使用）；第二阶段引入基于选择性状态空间序列建模的视角不变多尺度时间编码器，跨视点和时间尺度聚合信息。

Result: 在PKU-MMD和BABEL基准测试中，该方法在所有分割设置上均显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 所提出的两阶段框架有效结合了虚拟视点增强与多尺度时间建模，为未修剪视频中的人体动作检测提供了鲁棒的视角不变性和时间一致性解决方案。

Abstract: Viewpoint change invariance and action temporal consistency are critical aspects for the effective deployment of human action detection of untrimmed videos. Existing appearance-based video detection methods often struggle with limited viewpoint diversity during training, while motion-based detection approaches frequently fail to model fine-grained temporal relationships across consecutive motion windows. This paper introduces a novel two-stage action detection approach designed to improve both view-invariance and global temporal coherence properties. In the first stage, we extract motion features from augmented virtual viewpoints, solely used at training. Then, the second stage introduces a new view-invariant, multi-scale temporal encoder based on selective state-space sequence modelling to aggregate information across viewpoints and time scales. Experiments on PKU-MMD and BABEL benchmarks demonstrate that this approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in all considered splits. Code and trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/HydraView-TAD

</details>


### [131] [Cross-Domain Human Action Recognition from Multiview Motion and Textual Descriptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22697)
*Yannick Porto,Renato Martins,Thomas Chalumeau,Cedric Demonceaux*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种面向人体朝向与视角变化的自适应零样本动作识别方法，通过多视角运动编码和朝向感知文本提示，显著提升跨域泛化能力，在多个基准数据集上达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本动作识别（ZSAR）方法大多假设测试时的动作朝向与训练时相似，但实际中人体朝向与摄像机视角变化会造成严重的域偏移，极大限制了模型对未见动作-运动组合的泛化能力。因此，亟需一种无需强标注、能鲁棒处理朝向变化的动作识别方法。

Method: 本文提出朝向感知的动作识别框架：1）设计**朝向感知的运动编码网络**，从多摄像机视角中学习不同的运动特征；2）在训练阶段结合多视角运动线索与动作文本描述；3）推理时采用**朝向感知文本提示**，将文本特征与对应朝向的运动特征进行匹配，实现跨域零样本识别。

Result: 在NTU-RGB+D、BABEL、NW-UCLA及两个监控数据集上，本方法在零样本动作识别任务上一致超越现有最先进方法。此外，学到的表示具有强迁移学习能力，在跨域和同域的已知动作识别上也达到竞争性能。

Conclusion: 本文提出的朝向感知运动编码与文本提示匹配策略，有效缩小了零样本动作识别中因人体朝向和视角变化带来的域差距，为面向真实场景的鲁棒动作识别提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Robustness to domain changes is a key capability for effective deployment of human action recognition systems in real-world scenarios, where action categories at inference can present important domain shifts or even unseen actions from training. In this context, improving the recognition capabilities of Zero-Shot Action Recognition models (ZSAR), without requiring strong annotation efforts, remains a central challenge. Most ZSAR approaches assume that actions are observed under geometric conditions similar to those seen during training. In practice, variations in human body orientation and camera viewpoint add a significant domain gap in ZSAR, substantially limiting generalization to novel action-motion combinations. In this context, this paper presents a novel orientation-aware action recognition approach with improved cross-domain capabilities. Our approach combines motion cues of multiple camera viewpoints and text descriptions of human actions in the training phase. We present a new orientation-aware motion encoding network to learn different motion features, and adapt a specific orientation-aware text prompt to match the corresponding features at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves ZSAR performance across different recognition benchmarks, outperforming recent state-of-the-art zero-shot approaches on NTU-RGB+D, BABEL, NW-UCLA, and on two surveillance datasets. In addition, the learned representations exhibit strong transfer learning capabilities, yielding competitive performance on both cross-domain and same-domain recognition of seen actions. Code and trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/OrientationAware-HAR

</details>


### [132] [WorldKV: Efficient World Memory with World Retrieval and Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22718)
*Jung Yi,Minjae Kim,Paul Hyunbin Cho,Wooseok Jang,Sangdoo Yun,Seungryong Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: WorldKV提出了一种无需训练的视频世界模型框架，通过World Retrieval（世界检索）和World Compression（世界压缩）两个组件，在保持长期一致性的同时实现了高吞吐量的实时视频生成，解决了自回归视频扩散模型中全KV缓存注意力计算成本高与滑动窗口推理丢失长期一致性的矛盾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自回归视频扩散模型在实时、动作条件的世界生成方面取得了进展，但要维持一个持久的世界（即重新访问之前看到的视角时内容保持一致）仍是一个开放问题。全KV缓存注意力能保持一致性但破坏实时性，滑动窗口推理恢复吞吐量但丢弃了长期一致性。

Method: WorldKV包含两个组件：1) World Retrieval：将淘汰的KV缓存块存储在GPU/CPU内存中，通过相机/动作对应关系选择性检索场景相关块，将其插回原生注意力窗口而无需重新编码；2) World Compression：通过锚定帧的键-键相似性修剪每个块中的冗余令牌，将每块存储减半，从而在固定预算下容纳2倍以上的历史信息。

Result: 在Matrix-Game-2.0和LingBot-World-Fast上，WorldKV在约2倍吞吐量下匹配或超越了全KV存储的保真度，且无需微调即可与经过内存训练的基线方法竞争。

Conclusion: WorldKV是一个无需训练即可有效解决视频扩散模型中长期一致性与实时性矛盾的框架，通过检索和压缩机制实现了高效的世界持久化。

Abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models have enabled real-time, action-conditioned world generation. However, sustaining a persistent world, where revisiting a previously seen viewpoint yields consistent content, remains an open problem. Full KV-cache attention preserves this consistency but breaks real-time constraints: memory footprint and attention cost grow linearly with rollout length. Sliding window inference restores throughput but discards long-term consistency. We propose WorldKV, a training-free framework with two components: World Retrieval and World Compression. World Retrieval stores evicted KV-cache chunks in GPU/CPU memory and selectively retrieves scene-relevant chunks via camera/ action correspondence, inserting them back into the native attention window without re-encoding. World Compression prunes redundant tokens within each chunk via key-key similarity to an anchor frame, halving per-chunk storage to fit 2x more history under a fixed budget. On Matrix-Game-2.0 and LingBot- World-Fast, WorldKV matches or exceeds full-KV memory fidelity at roughly 2x the throughput, and is competitive with memory-trained baselines without any fine-tuning. Project Page: https://cvlab-kaist.github.io/WorldKV/

</details>


### [133] [Spectral Tail Auxiliary Learning for AI-Generated Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22751)
*Xingyi Li,Jiahui Zhang,Yiheng Li,Yun Cao,Wenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现生成图像在超高频尾部存在异常抬升现象（光谱尾部抬升），并将其归因于生成模型的非线性谐波累积。基于此提出STAL方法，通过频域辅助监督框架提升AI生成图像检测的泛化能力，且推理时无额外开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测方法虽利用频域线索，但对频域中具体、可复现的频谱规律理解尚不充分，缺乏系统性刻画。

Method: 1）系统分析真实与生成图像的一维径向对数功率谱，发现生成图像在超高频尾部存在异常抬升（光谱尾部抬升）；2）将这一现象归因于生成模型训练中的非线性谐波累积；3）提出STAL框架，利用尾部感知的频域教师网络向空间域检测器传递光谱尾部线索，训练后频域模块可丢弃，无推理开销。

Result: 在9个公开数据集上，STAL在跨生成器、跨数据分布及真实场景下均表现出强泛化性和稳定性。

Conclusion: 光谱尾部抬升可作为跨生成架构的结构性检测线索；STAL框架在无推理开销的前提下有效提升检测器的泛化能力。

Abstract: As generative image models evolve rapidly, the perceptual gap between generated and real images continues to narrow, making AI-generated image detection increasingly challenging. Many existing methods exploit frequency-domain cues for detection, typically described as frequency-domain artifacts or high-frequency discrepancies. However, the specific and recurring spectral regularities remain insufficiently understood and characterized. In this paper, we systematically analyze the one-dimensional radial log-power spectra of real and generated images. We find that generated images do not necessarily exhibit higher or lower energy across the entire spectrum or high-band range. Instead, their spectra deviate from the power-law decay and show an anomalous uplift in the ultra-high-frequency tail. We term this phenomenon spectral tail uplift. We further attribute this phenomenon to nonlinear harmonic accumulation in trained generative models, suggesting that it can serve as a structural cue across generative architectures. Based on this observation, we propose Spectral Tail Auxiliary Learning (STAL), a frequency-domain auxiliary supervision framework for generalizable AI-generated image detection. STAL transfers spectral-tail cues from a tail-aware frequency teacher to a spatial detector during training, while all frequency-domain modules are discarded at inference time. Consequently, STAL introduces no inference overhead. Extensive experiments on 9 public datasets show that STAL achieves strong generalization and stability across generators, data distributions, and real-world scenarios.

</details>


### [134] [Synthetic Data Alone is Enough? Rethinking Data Scarcity in Pediatric Rare Disease Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22767)
*Ganlin Feng,Yuxi Long,Erin Lou,Lianghong Chen,Zihao Jing,Pingzhao Hu,Wei Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究在超低资源儿科环境下，仅使用合成面部图像训练模型进行罕见病识别。实验表明，当合成数据规模足够大时，纯合成训练能达到与真实数据训练相当的性能，为保护隐私的儿科遗传诊断和教育提供了新路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 患有罕见遗传病的儿童常表现出独特的面部表型，但儿科场景中数据极度稀缺、隐私限制严格、数据共享困难，导致自动化诊断和遗传咨询资源匮乏。现有合成数据虽能增强真实数据集，但尚不清楚纯合成数据能否在超低资源场景下独立支持学习。

Method: 在受控实验设置下，仅使用表型感知的合成儿童面部图像训练模型，并逐步扩大合成数据规模，与仅使用真实数据的基线进行对比，评估多种主干网络的性能表现。

Result: 在足够规模下，纯合成训练在多个骨干网络上取得了与真实数据基线相当的性能，表明高保真合成数据能够近似临床有意义的分布。

Conclusion: 合成数据可作为保护隐私的儿科遗传教育资源用于临床医生培训和患者沟通，展示了计算机视觉在提升儿童医疗数据效率和扩展可视化工具方面的潜力。

Abstract: Children with rare genetic diseases often exhibit distinctive facial phenotypes, yet developing computer vision systems for early diagnosis remains challenging due to extreme data scarcity, privacy constraints, and limited data sharing in pediatric settings. These challenges not only hinder automated diagnosis but also restrict the availability of visual resources for clinical genetic counseling. While prior work has shown that synthetic data can augment real datasets and preserve phenotype-level semantics, it remains unclear whether synthetic data alone is sufficient for learning in ultra-low-resource pediatric settings. In this work, we study the synthetic-only regime for pediatric rare disease recognition. Under a controlled experimental setup, models are trained exclusively on phenotype-aware synthetic facial images at increasing scales. We find that synthetic-only training achieves performance comparable to real-data-only baselines at sufficient scale across multiple backbones, suggesting that high-fidelity synthetic data can approximate clinically meaningful distributions. These findings together further enable the use of synthetic pediatric facial images as privacy-preserving resources for genetic education and counseling, supporting clinician training and patient communication. Our results highlight the potential of computer vision to improve data efficiency and expand accessible visual tools in children's healthcare.

</details>


### [135] [DecQ: Detail-Condensing Queries for Enhanced Reconstruction and Generation in Representation Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22777)
*Tianhang Wang,Yitong Chen,Wei Song,Zuxuan Wu,Min Li,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DecQ通过在冻结的视觉基础模型（VFM）中引入轻量级细节浓缩查询（detail-condensing queries），从中间层特征提取细粒度信息，同时支持高质量重建和生成，有效解决了RAEs中重建与生成性能的权衡问题，仅用少量额外计算即可显著提升PSNR和FID指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAEs中，冻结VFM会限制空间重建能力，导致细粒度生成和图像编辑受限；而引入面向重建的微调则会破坏预训练语义空间并降低生成保真度。作者旨在解决这一重建与生成性能之间的权衡问题。

Method: 提出DecQ框架，在RAE的解码器中引入轻量级细节浓缩查询（detail-condensing queries），通过冷凝器模块（condenser modules）从VFM中间层特征中提取细粒度信息。这些查询在生成建模时与patch tokens联合生成，同时聚合浅层和深层特征信息。

Result: 仅用8个额外查询和3.9%的额外计算量，PSNR从19.13 dB提升至22.76 dB；生成建模实现3.3倍收敛加速，无引导FID为1.41，有引导FID为1.05。

Conclusion: DecQ通过轻量级查询机制有效缓解了RAEs中重建与生成的权衡，在提升重建质量的同时加速了生成收敛，且额外计算开销极小。

Abstract: Representation Autoencoders (RAEs) leverage frozen vision foundation models (VFMs) as tokenizer encoders, providing robust high-level representations that facilitate fast convergence and high-quality generation in latent diffusion models. However, freezing the VFM inherently constrains its spatial reconstruction capacity, limiting fine-grained generation and image editing; in contrast, incorporating reconstruction-oriented signals via fine-tuning disrupts the pretrained semantic space and degrades generative fidelity. To address this trade-off, we propose DecQ, a simple yet effective framework for RAEs. Specifically, DecQ introduces lightweight detail-condensing queries that extract fine-grained information from intermediate VFM features through condenser modules. These queries are incorporated into the decoder to support reconstruction and are jointly generated with patch tokens during generative modeling. By aggregating information from both shallow and deep layers, DecQ effectively mitigates the reconstruction--generation trade-off, improving both reconstruction quality and generative performance. Our experiments demonstrate that: (1) with only 8 additional queries and 3.9% extra computation, DecQ improves reconstruction over the frozen DINOv2-based RAE, increasing PSNR from 19.13 dB to 22.76 dB; and (2) for generative modeling, DecQ achieves 3.3$\times$ faster convergence than RAE, attaining an FID of 1.41 without guidance and 1.05 with guidance.

</details>


### [136] [Sensor2Sensor: Cross-Embodiment Sensor Conversion for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22809)
*Jiahao Wang,Bo Sun,Yijing Bai,Vincent Casser,Songyou Peng,Zehao Zhu,Meng-Li Shih,Xander Masotto,Shih-Yang Su,Kanaad V Parvate,Tiancheng Ge,Linn Bieske,Dragomir Anguelov,Mingxing Tan,Chiyu Max Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Sensor2Sensor框架，将单目行车记录仪视频转换为自动驾驶系统所需的多模态传感器数据（多视角相机图像+激光雷达点云），通过4D高斯溅射重建和扩散模型实现无配对训练数据的生成，解锁海量外部视频数据用于自动驾驶开发。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶训练数据存在规模有限、传感器配置单一、地理和长尾场景覆盖不足的问题，而海量行车记录仪视频数据虽丰富却与自动驾驶系统需要的结构化多模态输入不兼容，亟需一种能桥接这两种数据格式的生成方法。

Method: 首先利用4D高斯溅射（4DGS）将真实自动驾驶日志重建并渲染为行车记录仪风格视频作为配对训练数据；然后采用扩散模型架构，将单目行车记录仪视频生成式转换为多视角相机图像和激光雷达点云。

Result: 对生成传感器数据的保真度和真实感进行了全面量化评估，并成功将网络和行车记录仪视频转换为逼真的多模态数据格式。

Conclusion: Sensor2Sensor有效解锁了互联网和行车记录仪等外部视频数据源，为自动驾驶系统的大规模训练和验证提供了可行的数据扩展途径。

Abstract: Robust training and validation of Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) require massive, diverse datasets. Proprietary data collected by Autonomous Vehicle (AV) fleets, while high-fidelity, are limited in scale, diversity of sensor configurations, as well as geographic and long-tail-behavioral coverage. In contrast, in-the-wild data from sources like dashcams offers immense scale and diversity, capturing critical long-tail scenarios and novel environments. However, this unstructured, in-the-wild video data is incompatible with ADS expecting structured, multi-modal sensor inputs for validation and training. To bridge this data gap, we propose Sensor2Sensor, a novel generative modeling paradigm that translates in-the-wild monocular dashcam videos into a high-fidelity, multi-modal sensor suite (AV logs) comprising multi-view camera images and LiDAR point clouds. A core challenge is the lack of paired training data. We address this by converting real AV logs into dashcam-style videos via 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) reconstruction and novel-view rendering. Sensor2Sensor then utilizes a diffusion architecture to perform the generative conversion. We perform comprehensive quantitative evaluations on the fidelity and realism of the generated sensor data. We demonstrate Sensor2Sensor's practical utility by converting challenging in-the-wild internet and dashcam footage into realistic, multi-modal data formats, further unlocking vast external data sources for AV development.

</details>


### [137] [MotiMotion: Motion-Controlled Video Generation with Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22818)
*Lee Hsin-Ying,Hanwen Jiang,Yiqun Mei,Jing Shi,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Zhixin Shu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MotiMotion提出了一种"推理-生成"框架，通过视觉语言推理器完善主轨迹、幻觉次级运动，并引入置信度感知控制机制，生成更自然、因果合理的运动控制视频。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有运动控制图像转视频模型严格遵循用户提供的稀疏、不精确且因果不完整的轨迹，导致生成结果不自然，尤其缺乏对次级因果后果的建模。

Method: 1) 使用无训练的视觉语言推理器优化主轨迹并幻觉合理的次级运动；2) 提出置信度感知控制方案，高置信区域紧密跟随，低置信区域利用生成先验修正伪影；3) 构建MotiBench基准用于评估。

Result: 在MotiBench上，基于VLM评估和人类研究均表明MotiMotion生成的对象行为和交互更合理，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 将运动控制重新定义为"推理-生成"问题，并引入因果推理和置信度感知机制，能有效提升视频生成的自然性和合理性。

Abstract: Current motion-controlled image-to-video generation models rigidly follow user-provided trajectories that are often sparse, imprecise, and causally incomplete. Such reliance often yields unnatural or implausible outcomes, especially by missing secondary causal consequences. To address this, we introduce MotiMotion, a novel framework that reformulates motion control as a reasoning-then-generation problem. To encourage causally grounded and commonsense-consistent interactions, we leverage a training-free vision-language reasoner to refine image-space coordinates of primary trajectories and to hallucinate plausible secondary motions. To further improve motion naturalness, we propose a confidence-aware control scheme that modulates guidance strength, enabling the model to closely follow high-confidence plans while correcting artifacts under low-confidence inputs with its internal generative priors. To support systematic evaluation, we curate a new image-to-video benchmark, MotiBench, consisting of interaction-centric scenes where new events are triggered by motion. Both VLM-based evaluation and a human study on MotiBench demonstrate that MotiMotion produces videos with more plausible object behaviors and interaction, and is preferred over existing approaches.

</details>


### [138] [Cambrian-P: Pose-Grounded Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22819)
*Jihan Yang,Zifan Zhao,Xichen Pan,Shusheng Yang,Junyi Zhang,Bingyi Kang,Hu Xu,Saining Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Cambrian-P，通过引入每帧可学习相机token和位姿回归头，将相机位姿作为轻量监督信号增强视频多模态大模型。在空间推理基准上提升4.5-6.5%，在8个视频QA基准上表现优异，并实现了SOTA的流式位姿估计。伪标注位姿还能提升通用视频QA，表明位姿信号超越空间推理，是物理世界视频理解的基础信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频多模态大模型将视频帧视为孤立的2D快照，忽略了相机位姿这一在帧间构建共享空间坐标系的信号，导致缺乏人类对持续场景的感知能力。

Method: 提出Cambrian-P模型：1）为每帧添加可学习的相机token；2）引入位姿回归头进行监督；3）设计精心采样的训练策略；4）支持使用伪标注位姿进行训练。

Result: 在VSI-Bench等空间推理基准上提升4.5-6.5%，在8个额外空间及通用视频QA基准上表现优异，在ScanNet上达到SOTA流式位姿估计，伪标注位姿训练的模型也能提升通用视频QA性能。

Conclusion: 相机位姿是视频理解模型感知物理世界的基础信号，其价值不仅限于空间推理，还能泛化到通用视频理解任务中。

Abstract: Camera pose matters. The position and orientation of each viewpoint define a shared spatial coordinate frame that relates observations across video frames. Yet this signal is largely absent from multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) for video understanding, which process frames as isolated 2D snapshots, instead of the persistent scene humans perceive. We revisit pose as a lightweight supervisory signal and introduce Cambrian-P, a video MLLM augmented with per-frame learnable camera tokens and a pose regression head. With a carefully designed sampling scheme, the model achieves substantial gains of 4.5-6.5% on spatial reasoning benchmarks such as VSI-Bench, generalizes across eight additional spatial and general video QA benchmarks, and, as a byproduct, achieves state of the art streaming pose estimation on ScanNet. Surprisingly, training on pseudo-annotated poses from in-the-wild video further improves general video QA benchmarks, showing pose helps beyond spatial reasoning. Together, these results position camera pose as a fundamental signal for video models that reason about the physical world.

</details>


### [139] [Which Way Did It Move? Diagnosing and Overcoming Directional Motion Blindness in Video-LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22823)
*Jongseo Lee,Hyuntak Lee,Sunghun Kim,Sooa Kim,Jihoon Chung,Jinwoo Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Video-LLMs在时间视频理解上进展迅速，但无法感知基本运动方向（左、右、上、下），表现出"方向运动盲视"。问题源于方向绑定缺口：运动方向信息在视觉编码器、投影器和LLM隐藏状态中线性可访问，但无法正确绑定到语言答案。提出MoDirect数据集和DeltaDirect方法（基于相邻帧特征差预测归一化2D运动向量的投影器目标），将合成基准准确率从25.9%提升至85.4%，真实场景准确率提升21.9个百分点，且不损害标准视频理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video-LLMs虽然整体表现不错，但在最基本的运动方向感知任务上表现极差（接近随机），揭示出当前模型在基础视觉感知能力上的严重缺陷。作者希望定位这一缺陷的根源，并提出有效的解决方案。

Method: 1. 通过线性探针实验定位问题：发现运动方向信息在模型各层（视觉编码器、投影器、LLM隐藏状态）中均线性可访问，但无法正确绑定到语言答案，即"方向绑定缺口"。2. 提出MoDirect数据集（合成+真实场景）。3. 提出DeltaDirect方法：一种基于诊断驱动的投影器级目标函数，通过预测相邻帧特征差的归一化2D运动向量来增强运动方向感知。

Result: 在MoDirect-SynBench上，DeltaDirect将运动方向准确率从25.9%提升至85.4%。在MoDirect-RealBench上，无需真实场景训练数据，DeltaDirect将真实运动方向准确率提升21.9个百分点，同时保持标准视频理解性能不变。

Conclusion: Video-LLMs存在方向运动盲视，根源在于方向绑定缺口而非信息丢失。DeltaDirect通过投影器级的目标函数有效弥补了这一缺口，展示了诊断驱动改进的潜力，且具有良好的域外泛化能力。

Abstract: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have made rapid progress on temporal video understanding, yet many fail at a basic perceptual primitive: signed image-plane motion direction. On simple videos of a single object moving left, right, up, or down, most Video-LLMs perform near chance, with above-chance cases largely attributable to prediction biases rather than genuine direction understanding. We call this failure directional motion blindness. We localize the failure by tracing motion direction information through the Video-LLM pipeline. Motion direction remains linearly accessible from the vision encoder, projector, and LLM hidden states, but the readout fails to bind this signal to the correct verbal answer option, revealing a direction binding gap. Although synthetic motion direction instruction tuning reduces this gap on the source domain, motion direction concept vector analysis shows that visual complexity weakens the signal magnitude and limits out-of-domain generalization. We introduce MoDirect, a dataset family for motion direction instruction tuning and evaluation, and DeltaDirect, a diagnosis-driven, projector-level objective that predicts normalized 2-D motion vectors from adjacent-frame feature deltas. On MoDirect-SynBench, instruction tuning with DeltaDirect improves motion direction accuracy from 25.9% to 85.4%. On MoDirect-RealBench, DeltaDirect improves real-world motion direction accuracy by 21.9 points over the vanilla baseline without real-world tuning data, while preserving standard video-understanding performance. Code: https://github.com/KHU-VLL/DeltaDirect

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [140] [CR4T: Rewrite-Based Guardrails for Adolescent LLM Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21609)
*Heajun An,Qi Zhang,Vedanth Achanta,Jin-Hee Cho*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CR4T框架，将面向青少年的LLM安全从"拒绝式过滤"转向"选择性重构"，通过检测与重写机制，在保留善意意图的同时将不安全或拒绝式回复转化为适龄引导型内容，实验表明该方法能有效减少不安全输出和不必要的对话中断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全机制以成人规范为中心，采用"拒绝式压制"策略，在减少政策违规的同时也造成了对话死胡同，限制了建设性引导，未能解决青少年与AI交互中的发展脆弱性。

Method: CR4T是一个模型无关的保护框架，结合轻量级风险检测与领域条件化重写，选择性重构不安全或拒绝式输出，去除风险内容、减少不必要的对话中断，并加入发展适宜性引导。

Result: 定向重写显著减少了不安全输出和拒绝式回复，同时避免了对可接受交互的不必要干预，实现了更精准的安全干预。

Conclusion: 选择性回复重构为面向青少年的LLM系统提供了一种比拒绝式防护栏更以人为中心的替代方案，应将青少年LLM安全视为一个社会技术性、与发展阶段对齐的转化问题，而非单纯的过滤问题。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in adolescent digital environments, mediating information seeking, advice, and emotionally sensitive interactions. Yet existing safety mechanisms remain largely grounded in adult-centric norms and operationalize safety through refusal-oriented suppression. While such approaches may reduce immediate policy violations, they can also create conversational dead-ends, limit constructive guidance, and fail to address the developmental vulnerabilities inherent in adolescent-AI interactions. We argue that adolescent LLM safety should be framed not solely as a filtering problem, but as a socio-technical, developmentally aligned transformation problem. To operationalize this perspective, we propose Critique-and-Revise-for-Teenagers (CR4T), a model-agnostic safeguarding framework that selectively reconstructs unsafe or refusal-style outputs into ageappropriate, guidance-oriented responses while preserving benign intent. CR4T combines lightweight risk detection with domain-conditioned rewriting to remove risk-amplifying content, reduce unnecessary conversational shutdown, and introduce developmentally appropriate guidance. Experimental results show that targeted rewriting substantially reduces unsafe and refusal-oriented outcomes while avoiding unnecessary intervention on acceptable interactions. These findings suggest that selective response reconstruction offers a more human-centered alternative to refusal-centric guardrails for adolescent-facing LLM systems.

</details>


### [141] [Broadening Access to Transportation Safety Data with Generative AI: A Schema-Grounded Framework for Spatial Natural Language Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21712)
*Mahdi Azhdari,Eric J. Gonzales*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的自然语言接口，将交通安全的自然语言查询转化为结构化语义框架，通过规则验证和有向无环图编译，在PostGIS数据库中执行确定性分析，从而降低数据分析门槛，同时保证结果的可复现性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 交通安全分析需要整合事故记录、道路属性和地理空间数据，但现有工具技术门槛高，地方机构、学校委员会和居民等利益相关者虽有关切却缺乏数据检索、过滤、制图和分析的能力，亟需一种降低访问障碍的解决方案。

Method: 设计了一个基于模式（schema-grounded）的自然语言接口，利用LLM将用户查询解析为结构化语义框架，经规则验证层校正后编译为类型化的有向无环图（DAG），最终在PostGIS数据库中执行确定性空间操作。该设计将语言理解与确定性执行分离，确保结果可复现且基于模式。

Result: 在麻萨诸塞州全州交通安全数据库（整合事故记录、道路属性及学校、公交站、人行横道、市政边界等地理空间层）上进行评估，所有查询均成功执行；验证层纠正了29%的评估查询中的错误，反映了灵活自然语言与严格模式化需求之间的差距。

Conclusion: 将自然语言的可访问性与确定性执行相结合，是扩大交通安全数据使用范围的实际可行方向，对公共部门规划中可信AI的应用具有启示意义。

Abstract: Transportation safety analysis requires integrating crash records, roadway attributes, and geospatial data through GIS-based workflows, but access remains uneven across agencies and community stakeholders. Technical prerequisites create a gap between analytical tools central to safety planning and the practitioners able to use them. Local agencies, school committees, and residents may have safety concerns but limited capacity to retrieve, filter, map, and analyze relevant data. Generative AI offers a way to narrow this divide, but its public-sector use raises questions about reliability, reproducibility, and governance. This paper presents a schema-grounded natural language interface for transportation safety analysis, using a large language model (LLM) to interpret user intent while preserving deterministic, reviewable execution against an authoritative database. User queries are translated into structured semantic frames, validated by a rule-based layer, compiled into a typed directed acyclic graph of spatial operations, and executed against a PostGIS database. This bounded design separates language interpretation from deterministic execution, keeping results reproducible and schema-grounded while removing access barriers. The framework is evaluated using a statewide Massachusetts transportation safety database integrating crash records, roadway attributes, and geospatial layers including schools, bus stops, crosswalks, and municipal boundaries. All queries executed successfully; the validation layer corrects errors in 29% of evaluation queries, reflecting the gap between flexible natural language and strict schema-grounded requirements. The results suggest that combining natural language accessibility with deterministic execution is a practical direction for broadening access to transportation safety data, with implications for trustworthy AI in public-sector planning.

</details>


### [142] [Sem-Detect: Semantic Level Detection of AI Generated Peer-Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21713)
*André V. Duarte,Brian Tufts,Aditya Oke,Fei Fang,Arlindo L. Oliveira,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Sem-Detect方法，通过结合文本特征与声明级语义分析来区分AI生成与人类撰写的同行评审，在20000余条评审数据中显著优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同行评审中AI生成内容的泛滥威胁学术诚信，现有检测方法仅关注文本表层特征，忽略了评审中蕴含的思想、判断和主张等语义信息。

Method: 提出Sem-Detect检测方法，将目标评审与同一论文的多个AI生成评审进行对比，利用不同AI模型在观点上趋于一致而人类评审更具多样性的特点，结合文本特征与声明级语义分析进行检测。

Result: 在ICLR和NeurIPS的20000余条评审数据上，二分类场景中TPR@0.1%FPR较最强基线提升25.5%；三分类场景中，经LLM润色的人类评审仅有不到3.5%被误判为AI生成。

Conclusion: Sem-Detect能有效区分纯AI生成评审与人类撰写评审（包括经LLM润色但仍保留人类判断的评审），证明声明级语义特征是检测AI生成内容的关键维度。

Abstract: How can we distinguish whether a peer review was written by a human or generated by an AI model? We argue that, in this setting, authorship should not be attributed solely from the textual features of a review, but also from the ideas, judgments, and claims it expresses. To this end, we propose Sem-Detect, an authorship detection method for peer reviews that operationalizes this principle by combining textual features with claim-level semantic analysis. Sem-Detect compares a target review against multiple AI-generated reviews of the same paper, leveraging the observation that different AI models tend to converge on similar points, while human reviewers introduce more unique and diverse ones. As a result, Sem-Detect is able to distinguish fully AI reviews from authentic human-written ones, including those that have been refined using an LLM but still reflect human judgment. Across a dataset of over 20,000 peer reviews from ICLR and NeurIPS conferences, Sem-Detect improves over the strongest baseline by 25.5% in TPR@0.1% FPR in the binary setting. Moreover, in the three-class scenario, we empirically show that LLM refinement preserves the semantic signals of human reviews, which remain distinct from the patterns exhibited by fully AI-generated text; as a result, fewer than 3.5% of LLM-refined human reviews are misclassified as AI-generated.

</details>


### [143] [Probabilistic Attribution For Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21726)
*Shilpika Shilpika,Carlo Graziani,Bethany Lusch,Venkatram Vishwanath,Michael E. Papka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文利用随机过程理论，通过贝叶斯公式反转LLM的下一token对数概率，提出了一种与模型架构无关的token归因度量方法，并计算熵与归因分数的关系，用于提升LLM的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM的可解释性方法多依赖于模型内部结构，缺乏通用的概率归因框架，作者希望从随机过程角度建立与模型架构无关的令牌级归因度量。

Method: 使用贝叶斯公式反转下一token的对数概率，得到给定提示下响应的条件概率，以及消去某个token后的条件概率，归因分数为两者比值的对数；同时计算给定上下文下单个提示token分布的熵。

Result: 在8个模型和7个提示上进行了评估，分析了异常、token敏感性、响应稳定性、模型稳定性和训练收敛性。

Conclusion: 所提方法能有效提升LLM的可解释性，帮助用户关注生成过程中不确定或不稳定的部分。

Abstract: The generative nature of Large Language Models (LLMs) is reflected in the conditional probabilities they compute to sample each response token given the previous tokens. These probabilities encode the distributional structure that the model learns in training and exploits in inference. In this work, we use these probabilities to situate LLMs within the mathematical theory of stochastic processes. We use this framework to design a model-agnostic probabilistic token attribution measure, using Bayes rule to invert the next-token log-probabilities so as to capture the models internal representation of the distribution over token sequences. The representation is independent of the models computational structure. This representation yields the conditional probability of the response given the prompt, and of the response given the prompt with a token marginalized away. Our attribution score is the log of the ratio of these probabilities. We further compute the entropies of a single prompts token distributions, conditioned on the remaining context. The interplay between entropy and attribution score sheds light on LLM behavior. We evaluate 8 models across 7 prompts and investigate anomalies, token sensitivity, response stability, model stability, and training convergence, thereby improving interpretability and guiding users to focus on uncertain or unstable parts of the generation.

</details>


### [144] [RankJudge: A Multi-Turn LLM-as-a-Judge Synthetic Benchmark Generator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21748)
*Zhenwei Tang,Zhaoyan Liu,Rasa Hosseinzadeh,Tongzi Wu,Keyvan Golestan,Jesse C. Cresswell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了RankJudge，一个用于评估LLM-as-a-judge在多轮对话中判断能力的基准生成器。它通过构造成对对话（其中一方注入单轮缺陷）来精确评估判断质量，并在机器学习、生物医学和金融三个领域对21个前沿LLM法官进行了评估排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-as-a-judge基准主要聚焦于简单的问答任务，无法匹配多轮对话的复杂性。随着基于LLM的交互式应用（如对话聊天机器人）的普及，模型开发者亟需一种能够评估LLM在复杂多轮对话中判断能力的标准化方法。

Method: RankJudge通过构造成对对话（其中一方注入单个缺陷）来生成基准。这种设计使得成对对话可以明确标注好坏，并将失败类别精确定位到单个轮次，从而实现了严格的联合正确性判断标准。论文在机器学习、生物医学和金融三个领域实现了RankJudge，评估了21个前沿LLM法官，并使用Bradley-Terry模型进行排序。此外，还通过难度评级动态筛选评估切片以减少标签噪声。

Result: 在三个领域（机器学习、生物医学、金融）对21个前沿LLM法官进行了评估排序，通过人类标注验证了动态筛选评估切片能有效降低标签噪声。法官排序在部分可观测性、粗粒度正确性标准和替代随机游走评分算法下保持稳定。

Conclusion: RankJudge能够有效评估LLM在多轮对话中的判断能力，其排名结果具有鲁棒性，在不同设置下保持稳定。该方法为复杂对话系统的自动评估提供了可靠的基准生成方案。

Abstract: As interactive LLM-based applications are created and refined, model developers need to evaluate the quality of generated text along many possible axes. For simpler systems, human evaluation may be practical, but in complicated systems like conversational chatbots, the amount of generated text can overwhelm human annotation resources. Model developers have begun to rely heavily on auto-evaluation, where LLMs are also used to judge generation quality. However, existing LLM-as-a-judge benchmarks largely focus on simple Q\&A tasks that do not match the complexity of multi-turn conversations. We introduce RankJudge, a benchmark generator for evaluating LLM-as-a-judge on multi-turn conversations grounded in reference documents. RankJudge creates pairs of conversations where one conversation has a single flaw injected into one turn. This construction allows paired conversations to be labeled unambiguously as better or worse, and precisely isolates failure categories to individual turns, enabling a strict joint correctness criterion for judging. We implement RankJudge across the domains of machine learning, biomedicine, and finance, evaluate 21 frontier LLM judges, and rank those judges via the Bradley-Terry model. Our formulation also allows ranking each conversation pair with difficulty ratings, which we use to dynamically curate the evaluation slice to reduce label noise, as confirmed via human annotation. We find that judge rankings are stable under partial observability, coarser correctness criteria, and an alternative random-walk rating algorithm.

</details>


### [145] [PromptNCE: Pointwise Mutual Information Predictions Using Only LLMs and Contrastive Estimation Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21776)
*Juliette Woodrow,Chris Piech*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PromptNCE方法，利用大语言模型零样本估计点互信息，无需训练任务特定的批评器，在三个数据集上Spearman相关性最高达0.82，并展示了在计算机教育低数据场景中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统从文本估计互信息需要训练任务特定的批评器，在低数据场景下受限。作者想探究大语言模型能否零样本估计点互信息，仅通过提示和概率输出。

Method: 提出PromptNCE方法，将条件概率估计建模为对比学习任务，在候选集中加入显式的OTHER类别。理论上证明加入OTHER可以恢复真实的P(y|x)而非仅排序，从而将对比提示转化为通用零样本概率估计器。

Result: 在三个公开数据集上，PromptNCE在所有零样本方法中表现最佳，与人类标注的PMI的Spearman相关性最高达0.82。

Conclusion: 大语言模型可以零样本估计点互信息，PromptNCE通过对比提示加OTHER类别实现通用概率估计，在低数据场景下有效。

Abstract: Estimating mutual information from text usually requires training a task-specific critic, which limits its use in low-data settings. We ask whether large language models can instead estimate pointwise mutual information zero-shot, using only prompts and elicited probabilities. We introduce a benchmark with human-derived ground-truth PMI across three publicly available datasets, and evaluate five information-theoretic prompting-based estimators. Our main method, PromptNCE, frames conditional probability estimation as a contrastive task and augments the candidate set with an explicit OTHER category.
